Retractor Lite Carrying Case # Retractor Lite Carrying Case The Retractor Lite Carrying Case is compatible with all of the Retractor Lite banner stands up to 36". All of the Retractor Lite stands include a soft carrying case, but this product works great as an upgrade for added protection. The case snaps shut to keep your display or graphics stored correctly. ![Retractor Lite Carrying Case](https://lag.azureedge.net/product-images/41c3d07b-a51b-40ee-bb77-3925377eb2bf.jpg) Product: Retractor Lite Carrying Case Quantity: (Min: 1, Max: 1000) ![Loading product options](/includes/Images/loadingBar.gif) Loading product options...
